categories.label: Knight — Treasure Collected
categories.description: Knight collects treasure tokens. Wins by killing the Dragon.

categories.label: Goblins — Tribe Tokens Placed
categories.description: Goblins scatter tribes across the cave. Wins by killing the Knight.

categories.label: Dragon — Wakefulness Track
categories.description: Dragon awakens over time. Wins by waking up fully and escaping the cave.

categories.label: Cave — Tiles Collapsed
categories.description: The Cave grows and collapses. Wins by collapsing enough tiles to bury everyone.

categories.label: Thief — Treasure Stashed
categories.description: Thief steals and stashes treasure. Wins by collecting and stashing enough loot.
